items.name: ZoneModel
items.doc:
Runtime grid model holding resolved rows and their proportional ratios.
Z on em od el struct.

items.name: RowZone
items.doc:
A resolved grid row with its name, ratio weight, and content kind.
R ow zo ne struct.

items.name: RowKind
items.doc:
Describes how a row's content is arranged: fixed element, column split, or empty.
R ow ki nd enum.

items.name: ColumnZone
items.doc:
A resolved column within a row, with an optional module assignment.
C ol um nz on e struct.

items.name: total_row_ratio
items.doc: Returns the sum of all row ratio weights in the grid.

items.name: row
items.doc: Looks up a row by name, returning a reference if found.

items.name: column
items.signature: pub fn column(&self, row_name: &str, col_name: &str) -> Option<&ColumnZone>
items.doc: Looks up a column by row and column name, returning a reference if found.

items.name: set_module
items.signature: pub fn set_module(&mut self, row_name: &str, col_name: &str, module: &str)
items.doc: Assigns a module name to a specific column within a row.

items.name: total_column_ratio
items.doc: Returns the sum of all column ratio weights in this row, or 0 if not column-based.
